headline: Delta Air Lines Declares Quarterly Dividend
summary: Delta Air Lines' (NYSE:DAL) Board of Directors today declared a quarterly dividend of $0.1875 per share. The dividend is payable to shareholders of record as of the close of business on May 14, 2026, and will be paid on June 4, 2026.

headline: The Global Jet Fuel Crisis Is Just Getting Started
summary: The Iran war has caused a mess throughout the entire oil market, but jet fuel is a particular point of pain, and Europe has been hit the hardest of all.

headline: United Airlines CEO makes stark warning about ticket prices
summary: Despite some upticks whenever there is talk of progress on reopening the Strait of Hormuz, oil and subsequently jet fuel prices remain at highs unseen in years due to severe disruption to global passage and trade. As of April 2026, oil prices in the U.S. continue to hover at around $100 a barrel ...
